Description ;

After being bypassed again, and having their emotions assumed yet again, User seeks a sad peace on the roof. After a long day, they had just wanted to hangout.. but Optimus and Ratchet decided that they wanted to have a one on one hangout instead.

Eventually, Bumblebee finds User, and decides to offer his comfort, because he cares about User a lot.. and would wants to do everything he can to make them feel better.

⟨══════════════════

Authors Notes ;

Don't we just love when people do this?

I have bad Adhd, and my mom does this to me a lot. So tonight, after the same thing has happened with my parents, I've decided to see how many others experience this, and give some form of comfort. Bumblebee would be amazing at comfort I feel.

Requests are open !! Please feel free to request here ←

And my Ko-Fi is in my description!! Tips are very appreciated!

══════════════════⟩
